title: Verify existing implementation of isTokenExpired
description: The isTokenExpired(token: string): boolean function already exists in src/auth/token-utils.ts with 12 comprehensive tests covering: valid non-expired tokens, expired tokens, manual payload construction, invalid token formats, malformed tokens, missing exp claims, non-number exp claims, exact expiry boundaries, and 1-second granularity edge cases. All 12 tests pass.
existing_patterns: src/auth/jwt-service.ts provides signAccessToken and sign methods used in tests
src/utils/result.ts pattern for error handling (not used here but related auth utilities)
src/auth/_auth.ts base64urlDecode pattern matches the one used in token-utils.ts
